markdown:
#  Change the Privacy Settings for a Commitment 
##  Background 
You can change the privacy settings on a commitment to control who can view it. By default, a commitment is visible to any user with 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Commitments tool. You can make a commitment 'Private' so it's only visible to users with 'Admin' level permissions, and you can also grant access to specific non-admin users, as well as your external collaborator's invoice contacts.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.  
OR
    * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool with the ['Update Purchase Order Contract' ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template)and/or the ['Update Work Order Contract' ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template)granular permissions enabled on your permission template.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To configure the project's default privacy settings for the Commitments tool, see [Configure the Default Privacy Settings for New Commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/configure-the-default-privacy-settings-for-new-commitments).


##  Prerequisites 
  * Create a Commitment


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool.
  2. Click the **Number** link in the table to open the desired commitment.
  3. In the **General** tab, click **Edit Contract**.
  4. Click **Contract Privacy**.
  5. Click **Edit**.
  6. _(Optional)_ Choose one of the following options:
     * To make the commitment visible to any user with 'Read Only' level permissions or higher, clear the **Private** checkbox. This is the default setting.
     * To make the commitment private, mark the **Private** checkbox
  7. _(Optional)_ If you made the contract private, add the names of any users on the project who can view the contract:  
![Commitment Contract Privacy](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c9474cb57228b9b68d3a2fb3ebf4b835/f9afad2aefb1eb26883fdaafb8f7d055/commitment-contract-privacy.png?fm=webp&h=266)
     * In the **Access for Non-Admin Users** field, add the names of any users on the project. If you also want these users to view the SOV, place a checkmark in the **Allow These Non-Admin Users to View the SOV items**.
     * In the **Invoice Contacts** field, add the names of any external collaborators. See [What is an invoice contact?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-an-invoice-contact)
  8. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Configure the Default Privacy Settings for New Commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/configure-the-default-privacy-settings-for-new-commitments)
  * [Commitments - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/permissions)
  * [Create Subcontracts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-subcontracts)
title: Change the Privacy Settings for a Commitment
description: How to change the privacy settings for an individual commitment.
